label.label: Field label
label._note: Renders as <label class="sgs-form-field__label"> — no per-instance colour/font-size/weight attribute exists on this block; the label is styled entirely by shared framework CSS across all six form-field siblings. clusters: [] is a genuine gap, not hidden — building per-field label typography/colour controls is future per-block work, not this manifest.

input.label: Textarea input
input._note: Renders as <textarea class="sgs-form-field__input"> — border/background/typography come entirely from shared framework CSS; no per-instance style attribute exists. `rows` is a behavioural sizing config (row count), not a style property, and stays outside any cluster. clusters: [] is a genuine gap.

help.label: Help text
help._note:
helpText itself is field-behaviour content, not a style property (Bean's non-cluster rule) — the rendered

also carries no per-instance style attribute of its own. clusters: []. The conformance checker's orphan scanner reports helpText as an ORPHAN here (its element-key-as-fallback-prefix convention coincidentally matches help+Text); this is a known false-positive of the checker, not evidence of an unaccounted style control — helpText is intentionally content, not style, and out of scope to silence without editing the checker script.

error.label: Error message
error._note: Populated by client-side validation JS, not a block attribute; the <span class="sgs-form-field__error"> has no per-instance style attribute. clusters: [].
